mapper.select: SELECT TO_CHAR( TRUNC(SUM( NVL(CURRENCT_PRICE, 0) ), -4) / 10000, 'FM9,999,999,999' ) || '万円' AS CURRENCT_PRICE_TOTAL_STR FROM ( SELECT SUM( NVL(CURRENCT_PRICE, 0) ) AS CURRENCT_PRICE FROM T_BALANCE_PREV WHERE DATE_YMD = (SELECT MAX(DATE_YMD) FROM T_BALANCE_PREV) AND BUTEN_CODE = #{butenCode} AND ACCOUNT_NUMBER = TO_NUMBER(#{accountNumber}) AND PRODUT_CD IN ( '01','51','52','25','12','04','13','15','16','14','99','100','50','98','97' ) GROUP BY BUTEN_CODE, ACCOUNT_NUMBER UNION ALL SELECT SUM(CURRENCT_PRICE) AS CURRENCT_PRICE FROM ( SELECT TRUNC(SUM( NVL(CURRENCT_PRICE, 0) ), 0) AS CURRENCT_PRICE, BRAND_CODE, DEPOSIT_TYPE, PRODUT_CD FROM T_BALANCE_PREV WHERE DATE_YMD = (SELECT MAX(DATE_YMD) FROM T_BALANCE_PREV) AND BUTEN_CODE = #{butenCode} AND ACCOUNT_NUMBER = TO_NUMBER(#{accountNumber}) AND PRODUT_CD = '06' GROUP BY BRAND_CODE, DEPOSIT_TYPE, PRODUT_CD ) )
